title: dryopsis manipurensis
intro: Dryopsis manipurensis is a species of fern native to the northeastern part of India, particularly in the state of Manipur. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, where it is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Dryopsis manipurensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to promote digestion and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are used to treat different health conditions.
